front.title: Clarification to Processing Key Usage Values During Certificate Revocation List (CRL) Validation
front.workgroup: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME

abstract.t: RFC 5280 defines the profile of X.509 certificates and Certificate Revocation Lists (CRLs) for use in the Internet. Section 4.2.1.3 of RFC 5280 requires CRL issuer certificates to contain the
